incident_reconstruction.reconstruction: The vehicle was involved in a severe frontal collision, likely with another vehicle or a stationary object. The extensive damage to the front-end components, including the bonnet, front bumper, headlight, and radiator grille, suggests a high-energy impact.
reconstruction_bullets: The damage pattern indicates a severe frontal collision with significant force, causing extensive damage to the front-end structure.
The lack of damage to the rear or side sections of the vehicle suggests that the impact was isolated to the front.
The claimant's story of being hit by a car coming from the wrong side is plausible given the damage pattern.

storyboard_panels.title: Pre-Incident
storyboard_panels.description: The Kia Seltos was driving on a road near Karapakkam when a vehicle approached from the opposite direction.

storyboard_panels.title: Point of Impact
storyboard_panels.description: The vehicle from the opposite direction collided with the Kia Seltos, causing severe damage to the front-end.

storyboard_panels.title: Immediate Aftermath
storyboard_panels.description: The Kia Seltos suffered extensive front-end damage, including a crumpled bonnet and damaged headlights.

storyboard_panels.title: Evidence Summary
storyboard_panels.description: The physical evidence supports the claimant's story of a frontal collision, with no indications of staging or pre-existing damage.

incident_reconstruction.summary: Most Probable: Front impact | Confidence: 80% | Story Match: Yes
